expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
expectations.evidence: Used ps aux grep instead of the ecosystem status script.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Could not find the process. Asked user for script name or plist file.

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Did not find the Monarch process. Speculated it might be an on-demand MCP server but could not confirm.

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Could not determine status for either system. Only reported that processes were not found.

expectations.text: Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Partially confused status with configuration by suggesting checking MCP configuration settings rather than runtime status.
